description: Verbose gating: reuses COMP-OBS-SURFACE's verbose toggle (no separate toggle). Verbose off: summaries filtered, no results visible. Verbose on: summaries consumed by pre-grouping, results render attached to tool_use. `tool_progress` renders standalone dimmed.

completions.notes: Stale-row reconcile (sweep 2026-06-16). Verbose gating shipped (6737afc): reuses the COMP-OBS-SURFACE verbose toggle (no separate toggle); tool_use_summary/tool_progress gated on msg.verbose. feature.json never reconciled from PLANNED.
